name: Hedge Logistica Fundo Investimento Imobiliario
summary: HLOG11 is a real estate investment fund (FII) focused on logistics properties in Brazil, aiming to generate income and capital appreciation through the acquisition and management of logistics assets. The fund invests primarily in warehouses and distribution centers located in strategic regions of Brazil. HLOG11.SA provides investors exposure to the growing logistics sector in Brazil through a diversified portfolio of real estate assets.
